title: Inspect note-lead rules for x-auto and recommend the minimum skill/doc changes to prevent long-form copy from remaining in reserved 06:50 note lead slots. Focus on /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md and /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.m...
summary_text: **Findings (current state)** - `x-auto-contract.md` already reserves Monday/Thursday `06:50` for self-authored `note.com` leads and says non-note rows must not use that slot, but it has **no operational hard gate** that blocks long-form/overlong bodies there. - `docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md` defines URL placement for `note.com` leads, but does **not** constrain body length, teaser depth, or scheduled-slot behavior. - `x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md` has `note.com` lead rules and preflight checks, but it does not validate **slot-boundary + body length/summary depth** together for `06:50`. So the gap is clear: slot reservation exists, but the “short teaser only” intent is not machine- or workflow-enforced for the reserved slot. **Minimum rule additions (recommended)** 1. Add this to `~/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md` under `Authority Order` → `Non-Negotiable Rules` (new subsection), and include the corresponding preflight item. ```md ### 2.3 06:50 note-lead hard gate (Mon/Thu JST) For rows scheduled for Monday or Thursday `06:50 JST`: - Only `note.com` lead mode is allowed. - The body must be teaser-form, not article-level summary. - Hard length gate for scheduler-safe status: - `Body` and `Body JA` each must be `< 500字` (or a stricter value if your team prefers, e.g., `<= 450字`). - If the body reads like a full summary (e.g., multiple numbered takeaway points, article section dump, complete issue/solution conclusion), reject and require rewrite before scheduling/approval. - If not note-lead-compliant, do not keep `approved`; demote to `draft` and flag for reschedule. ``` And add to `Mandatory Preflight` list: ```md 12. Slot-rule compliance for fixed-reserved slots: - If `Scheduled` is Monday/Thursday `06:50 JST`, verify `note.com` lead mode and the 06:50 hard gate (teaser intent + length cap). - If any check fails, stop before posting and require reschedule or rewrite. ``` 2. Add this to `docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md` near shared invariants (around existing 06:50 lines). ```md - For rows bound to Monday/Thursday `06:50`: - Lead mode is required (`note.com` lead rules, no Reply URL default). - Enforce a hard scheduler-safe teaser cap (e.g., `< 500字`) as a validation block. - If body scope drifts into article-level distillation (complete summary, exhaustive chapter-like structure, multiple solved implications), treat as non-compliant for that slot. - Non-compliant rows must fail scheduling validation and be demoted from `approved`. ``` 3. Add this to `docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md` under `Rule`/`Verification Boundary` to make the slot behavior explicit in the note-link contract. ```md 4. For rows targeting Monday/Thursday `06:50 JST`: - treat as reserved-slot note-leads only; - enforce short teaser form and do not allow long-form article recaps; - reject as invalid scheduler-safe content if it appears as a full replacement of the note (or exceeds the reserved-slot length cap). ``` **Why this is minimal** - One new hard gate in each contract layer (global contract, note-specific rule, operational guard), no new files. - Keeps current structure and terminology while turning the existing intent (“shortest viable teaser”) into enforceable behavior for the reserved slot.
